docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CARRASCO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CHETRIT, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
